policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-cosmos-02 - Microsoft Entra ID authentication'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Cosmos+DB#IncidentremediationCosmosDB#drcp-cosmos-02 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP CosmosDB Disable local auth
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents the use of local authentication methods in Azure Cosmos DB resources, so that Azure Active Directory authentication is required.

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
